subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O God, Lord of kings and Merciful unto all who are possessed. I beseech Thee by Thy Name through which Thou didst rend asunder the veils [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا مالک الملوک و راحم المملوک اسئلک باسمک الذی خرقت به الاحجاب
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @prayer for forgiveness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
